title: Loops not unrolling due to width mismatches?

features.name: for_loop_width_mismatch_bit_select_index
features.description: Code should include a for loop with a width-constrained loop variable (e.g., 3'd0) where the loop bound uses a different width than the loop variable increment

features.name: for_loop_small_width_with_narrowing_bit_select
features.description: Code should include a for loop where a 3-bit loop variable is used with a bit-select index (i3[0]) as array subscript, and loop bounds are mixed width

features.name: for_loop_unpacked_concat_in_body
features.description: Code should include a for loop with width-mismatched bounds that contains a concatenation expression in the loop body
